metadata.title: Quick 2v1 Retake on Mid with Smart Positioning in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a tense 2v1 mid retake where positioning and timing make all the difference. Notice how patience helps secure the round. What’s your favorite spot for clutch plays?

Share your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
